examples.text: I think we should go home.
examples.reading: I think we should go home.
examples.translation: Creo que deberíamos ir a casa.

examples.text: I believe you are right.
examples.reading: I believe you are right.
examples.translation: Creo que tenés razón.

examples.text: I feel tired after work.
examples.reading: I feel tired after work.
examples.translation: Me siento cansado después del trabajo.

examples.text: I hope you feel better soon.
examples.reading: I hope you feel better soon.
examples.translation: Espero que te sientas mejor pronto.

examples.text: Don't worry, everything will be fine.
examples.reading: Don't worry, everything will be fine.
examples.translation: No te preocupes, todo va a estar bien.

examples.text: I enjoy reading books in the evening.
examples.reading: I enjoy reading books in the evening.
examples.translation: Disfruto leyendo libros por la tarde.

examples.text: I prefer tea to coffee.
examples.reading: I prefer tea to coffee.
examples.translation: Prefiero el té al café.

examples.text: I suggest we take a break.
examples.reading: I suggest we take a break.
examples.translation: Sugiero que tomemos un descanso.

examples.text: I agree with your opinion.
examples.reading: I agree with your opinion.
examples.translation: Estoy de acuerdo con tu opinión.

examples.text: I disagree with that decision.
examples.reading: I disagree with that decision.
examples.translation: No estoy de acuerdo con esa decisión.

examples.text: Imagine you are on a beautiful beach.
examples.reading: Imagine you are on a beautiful beach.
examples.translation: Imaginá que estás en una playa hermosa.

examples.text: I remember my first day at school.
examples.reading: I remember my first day at school.
examples.translation: Recuerdo mi primer día en la escuela.

examples.text: Don't forget to call your mother.
examples.reading: Don't forget to call your mother.
examples.translation: No te olvides de llamar a tu madre.

examples.text: We need to decide by tomorrow.
examples.reading: We need to decide by tomorrow.
examples.translation: Necesitamos decidir para mañana.

examples.text: I expect to arrive at three o'clock.
examples.reading: I expect to arrive at three o'clock.
examples.translation: Espero llegar a las tres.

examples.text: We need to be at the airport two hours early.
examples.reading: We need to be at the airport two hours early.
examples.translation: Necesitamos estar en el aeropuerto dos horas antes.

examples.text: I bought a ticket to London.
examples.reading: I bought a ticket to London.
examples.translation: Compré un pasaje a Londres.

examples.text: Don't forget your passport!
examples.reading: Don't forget your passport!
examples.translation: ¡No te olvides el pasaporte!

examples.text: We stayed at a nice hotel near the beach.
examples.reading: We stayed at a nice hotel near the beach.
examples.translation: Nos quedamos en un lindo hotel cerca de la playa.

examples.text: I have a reservation for tonight.
examples.reading: I have a reservation for tonight.
examples.translation: Tengo una reserva para esta noche.

examples.text: Where can I pick up my luggage?
examples.reading: Where can I pick up my luggage?
examples.translation: ¿Dónde puedo recoger mi equipaje?

examples.text: My flight leaves at six in the morning.
examples.reading: My flight leaves at six in the morning.
examples.translation: Mi vuelo sale a las seis de la mañana.

examples.text: The train to Barcelona takes three hours.
examples.reading: The train to Barcelona takes three hours.
examples.translation: El tren a Barcelona tarda tres horas.

examples.text: I take the bus to work every day.
examples.reading: I take the bus to work every day.
examples.translation: Tomo el colectivo al trabajo todos los días.

examples.text: Can you show me on the map?
examples.reading: Can you show me on the map?
examples.translation: ¿Podés mostrarme en el mapa?

examples.text: There are many tourists in the city.
examples.reading: There are many tourists in the city.
examples.translation: Hay muchos turistas en la ciudad.

examples.text: The guide showed us the old part of the city.
examples.reading: The guide showed us the old part of the city.
examples.translation: El guía nos mostró la parte vieja de la ciudad.

examples.text: My suitcase is too heavy.
examples.reading: My suitcase is too heavy.
examples.translation: Mi maleta está demasiado pesada.

examples.text: Please show your boarding pass.
examples.reading: Please show your boarding pass.
examples.translation: Por favor, muestre su tarjeta de embarque.

examples.text: There is a two-hour delay on our flight.
examples.reading: There is a two-hour delay on our flight.
examples.translation: Hay una demora de dos horas en nuestro vuelo.

examples.text: She got a new job at a tech company.
examples.reading: She got a new job at a tech company.
examples.translation: Ella consiguió un nuevo trabajo en una empresa de tecnología.

examples.text: I work in an office downtown.
examples.reading: I work in an office downtown.
examples.translation: Trabajo en una oficina en el centro.

examples.text: We have a meeting at ten o'clock.
examples.reading: We have a meeting at ten o'clock.
examples.translation: Tenemos una reunión a las diez.

examples.text: My boss is very understanding.
examples.reading: My boss is very understanding.
examples.translation: Mi jefe es muy comprensivo.

examples.text: The salary is paid every month.
examples.reading: The salary is paid every month.
examples.translation: El salario se paga cada mes.

examples.text: My colleague helps me with difficult tasks.
examples.reading: My colleague helps me with difficult tasks.
examples.translation: Mi colega me ayuda con las tareas difíciles.

examples.text: We are working on an important project.
examples.reading: We are working on an important project.
examples.translation: Estamos trabajando en un proyecto importante.

examples.text: The deadline is next Friday.
examples.reading: The deadline is next Friday.
examples.translation: La fecha límite es el próximo viernes.

examples.text: Send your resume to the company.
examples.reading: Send your resume to the company.
examples.translation: Enviá tu currículum a la empresa.

examples.text: I have a job interview tomorrow.
examples.reading: I have a job interview tomorrow.
examples.translation: Tengo una entrevista de trabajo mañana.

examples.text: She got a promotion after two years.
examples.reading: She got a promotion after two years.
examples.translation: Ella recibió un ascenso después de dos años.

examples.text: The company has 500 employees.
examples.reading: The company has 500 employees.
examples.translation: La empresa tiene 500 empleados.

examples.text: Every employee gets health insurance.
examples.reading: Every employee gets health insurance.
examples.translation: Cada empleado tiene seguro médico.

examples.text: The manager will call you back.
examples.reading: The manager will call you back.
examples.translation: El gerente te va a devolver la llamada.

examples.text: What's your schedule for this week?
examples.reading: What's your schedule for this week?
examples.translation: ¿Cuál es tu horario para esta semana?

examples.text: You should see a doctor.
examples.reading: You should see a doctor.
examples.translation: Deberías ver a un médico.

examples.text: Take this medicine three times a day.
examples.reading: Take this medicine three times a day.
examples.translation: Tomá este medicamento tres veces al día.

examples.text: I have a terrible headache.
examples.reading: I have a terrible headache.
examples.translation: Tengo un dolor de cabeza terrible.

examples.text: She can't come because she is sick.
examples.reading: She can't come because she is sick.
examples.translation: Ella no puede venir porque está enferma.

examples.text: Eating fruit is healthy.
examples.reading: Eating fruit is healthy.
examples.translation: Comer fruta es saludable.

examples.text: I do exercise every morning.
examples.reading: I do exercise every morning.
examples.translation: Hago ejercicio cada mañana.

examples.text: I have a pain in my back.
examples.reading: I have a pain in my back.
examples.translation: Tengo un dolor en la espalda.

examples.text: The child has a high fever.
examples.reading: The child has a high fever.
examples.translation: El niño tiene fiebre alta.

examples.text: I have had a cough for three days.
examples.reading: I have had a cough for three days.
examples.translation: He tenido tos por tres días.

examples.text: Let's watch a movie tonight.
examples.reading: Let's watch a movie tonight.
examples.translation: Miremos una película esta noche.

examples.text: I listen to music while I study.
examples.reading: I listen to music while I study.
examples.translation: Escucho música mientras estudio.

examples.text: Football is the most popular sport here.
examples.reading: Football is the most popular sport here.
examples.translation: El fútbol es el deporte más popular acá.

examples.text: We watched the game on TV.
examples.reading: We watched the game on TV.
examples.translation: Vimos el partido por tele.

examples.text: We went to a concert last weekend.
examples.reading: We went to a concert last weekend.
examples.translation: Fuimos a un recital el fin de semana pasado.

examples.text: They are performing a play at the theater.
examples.reading: They are performing a play at the theater.
examples.translation: Están haciendo una obra en el teatro.

examples.text: What's your favorite TV show?
examples.reading: What's your favorite TV show?
examples.translation: ¿Cuál es tu serie favorita?

examples.text: Photography is my favorite hobby.
examples.reading: Photography is my favorite hobby.
examples.translation: La fotografía es mi pasatiempo favorito.

examples.text: Are you coming to the party on Saturday?
examples.reading: Are you coming to the party on Saturday?
examples.translation: ¿Venís a la fiesta el sábado?

examples.text: I stayed home because it was raining.
examples.reading: I stayed home because it was raining.
examples.translation: Me quedé en casa porque estaba lloviendo.

examples.text: The test was hard. However, I passed.
examples.reading: The test was hard. However, I passed.
examples.translation: El examen fue difícil. Sin embargo, aprobé.

examples.text: Although it was cold, we went for a walk.
examples.reading: Although it was cold, we went for a walk.
examples.translation: Aunque hacía frío, salimos a caminar.

examples.text: It was raining; therefore, we stayed inside.
examples.reading: It was raining; therefore, we stayed inside.
examples.translation: Estaba lloviendo; por lo tanto, nos quedamos adentro.

examples.text: The hotel was cheap. Moreover, it was near the beach.
examples.reading: The hotel was cheap. Moreover, it was near the beach.
examples.translation: El hotel era barato. Además, estaba cerca de la playa.

examples.text: I'll cook dinner. Meanwhile, you can set the table.
examples.reading: I'll cook dinner. Meanwhile, you can set the table.
examples.translation: Voy a cocinar la cena. Mientras tanto, podés poner la mesa.

examples.text: Besides English, I also speak French.
examples.reading: Besides English, I also speak French.
examples.translation: Además del inglés, también hablo francés.

examples.text: Actually, I changed my mind.
examples.reading: Actually, I changed my mind.
examples.translation: En realidad, cambié de opinión.

examples.text: It will probably rain tomorrow.
examples.reading: It will probably rain tomorrow.
examples.translation: Probablemente llueva mañana.

examples.text: I will definitely be there.
examples.reading: I will definitely be there.
examples.translation: Definitivamente voy a estar ahí.

examples.text: I'm looking for my keys.
examples.reading: I'm looking for my keys.
examples.translation: Estoy buscando mis llaves.

examples.text: Don't give up! You can do it.
examples.reading: Don't give up! You can do it.
examples.translation: ¡No te rindas! Podés hacerlo.

examples.text: Can you pick me up at the station?
examples.reading: Can you pick me up at the station?
examples.translation: ¿Podés buscarme en la estación?

examples.text: Turn on the light, please.
examples.reading: Turn on the light, please.
examples.translation: Prendé la luz, por favor.

examples.text: Turn off the TV before you go to bed.
examples.reading: Turn off the TV before you go to bed.
examples.translation: Apagá la tele antes de ir a dormir.

examples.text: I need to find out what happened.
examples.reading: I need to find out what happened.
examples.translation: Necesito descubrir qué pasó.

examples.text: I get along well with my colleagues.
examples.reading: I get along well with my colleagues.
examples.translation: Me llevo bien con mis colegas.

examples.text: Can you look after my dog this weekend?
examples.reading: Can you look after my dog this weekend?
examples.translation: ¿Podés cuidar a mi perro este fin de semana?

examples.text: We need to set up a meeting for next week.
examples.reading: We need to set up a meeting for next week.
examples.translation: Necesitamos organizar una reunión para la semana que viene.

examples.text: Don't put off your homework.
examples.reading: Don't put off your homework.
examples.translation: No postergues tu tarea.

examples.text: What time will you come back?
examples.reading: What time will you come back?
examples.translation: ¿A qué hora vas a volver?

examples.text: Please go on with your story.
examples.reading: Please go on with your story.
examples.translation: Por favor, continuá con tu historia.

examples.text: The plane takes off at noon.
examples.reading: The plane takes off at noon.
examples.translation: El avión despega al mediodía.

examples.text: She brought up an interesting point.
examples.reading: She brought up an interesting point.
examples.translation: Ella mencionó un punto interesante.

examples.text: We need to carry out more research.
examples.reading: We need to carry out more research.
examples.translation: Necesitamos llevar a cabo más investigación.

examples.text: Do we have enough time?
examples.reading: Do we have enough time?
examples.translation: ¿Tenemos suficiente tiempo?

examples.text: I have already finished my homework.
examples.reading: I have already finished my homework.
examples.translation: Ya terminé mi tarea.

examples.text: We are almost there.
examples.reading: We are almost there.
examples.translation: Ya casi llegamos.

examples.text: The exam was quite difficult.
examples.reading: The exam was quite difficult.
examples.translation: El examen fue bastante difícil.

examples.text: I have visited several countries in Europe.
examples.reading: I have visited several countries in Europe.
examples.translation: He visitado varios países en Europa.

examples.text: Is this table available?
examples.reading: Is this table available?
examples.translation: ¿Está disponible esta mesa?

examples.text: What is the main idea of the text?
examples.reading: What is the main idea of the text?
examples.translation: ¿Cuál es la idea principal del texto?

examples.text: This is a very common mistake.
examples.reading: This is a very common mistake.
examples.translation: Este es un error muy común.

examples.text: Have you seen any recent news?
examples.reading: Have you seen any recent news?
examples.translation: ¿Viste alguna noticia reciente?

examples.text: Spanish and Portuguese are similar languages.
examples.reading: Spanish and Portuguese are similar languages.
examples.translation: El español y el portugués son idiomas similares.
